title: reidia longiflora
intro: Reidia longiflora, also known as the climbing fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Urticaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Reidia longiflora include its ability to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and treat various infections. Reidia longiflora is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in topical applications to soothe skin irritations.
